narrative_beat: Wide cinco bandeiras nacionais em vitral rachadas por ouro liquido

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: five national flags rendered as stained glass windows in a Gothic church, each cracked down the middle by a flowing line of liquid gold: USA, UK, France, Germany, Japan
subject.focal_point: the liquid gold cracks connecting all five windows
subject.secondary: Light streaming through the cracked stained glass. Monochrome congressional building visible through the cracks.

environment.location: a Gothic church with large stained glass windows
environment.atmosphere: imperial decay, the richest nations cracking

composition.foreground: stained glass flags in vivid warm colors with gold cracks
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white congressional building visible through cracks

lighting.key_light: daylight filtering through stained glass creating colored light patches
lighting.fill_light: golden glow from liquid gold cracks

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: imperial decline, the rich nations cracking

symbolism.primary: sovereign debt crisis as stained glass shattering in a church
symbolism.secondary: liquid gold as wealth literally flowing out

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
